title: 日本ダービーの後に・アイツの背中

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I really... really hate this feeling.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about the complete and utter
determination she had while running.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Why does seeing her run make me so frustrated?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well? How about it? Now do you see how cool I
am?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...This isn't the time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'll never lose. Especially not to you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to forge my own path, whether you're
there or not.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'll show the whole world how cool I really am.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On our way back home...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: She's going to forge her own path, huh...

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
There's only one way to describe her performance
today—spectacular!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She'll live forever in our hearts as the number one
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Why?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Why? I wanted to win so badly. I wanted to be
the number one Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So why can't I forget the moment she became
number one?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Cool? What does that even mean?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Sorry to come by so late.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't accept this. I have to beat her.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't let her take the number one spot from me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to fall behind her. So you have to
train me up the best you can.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to be number one, I can't let her beat
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A brilliant flame burns in Daiwa Scarlet's eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's still not really able to see where this quest
for "number one" will take her, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With how far we've come together, I think I've
found a few clues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Shuka Sho, the last race of the
Triple Tiara.
